reasoning: The full table scan (ToListAsync + client-side Where) and N+1 product lookups in LoadCart/OnPostClearAsync, plus per-item SaveChangesAsync in the clear loop, can all be fixed within this single PageModel file by adding server-side .Where() filtering, .Include(c => c.Product) to eliminate N+1, and batching SaveChangesAsync outside the loop — no dependency, schema, or API contract changes required.
